requirements.title: Primary user workflow
requirements.statement: The product shall support the primary user workflow described by the project profile.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: A reviewer can trace the workflow to at least one user need, one design element, and one verification candidate.

requirements.title: Architecture-bounded maintainability
requirements.statement: The product architecture shall keep change-impact boundaries visible enough for review and handoff.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: A reviewer can identify impacted components, interfaces, data, and evidence records for a representative change.

requirements.title: Human review ergonomics
requirements.statement: Human reviewers shall receive a compact Review Brief that exposes priority, unresolved conditions, and authority boundaries without requiring full DB traversal.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The Review Brief shows functional/nonfunctional requirement counts, priorities, NFR origins, open conditions, and No-X boundaries.
